nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 4am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. Low around 62, with temperatures rising to around 65 overnight. Southeast wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 3pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 84. Southeast wind 15 to 28 mph, with gusts as high as 39 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 1am, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 1am and 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 4am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. Low around 64, with temperatures rising to around 66 overnight. Southeast wind 14 to 26 mph, with gusts as high as 37 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
